dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5817 IH: Disqualifying Dual Loyalty Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fine introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on House Administration

form.official-title: To prohibit the election to Congress of any person holding foreign citizenship.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Disqualifying Dual Loyalty Act of 2025.

section.header: Prohibition on election of any person holding foreign citizenship
section.text: No person, without regard to whether that person is a United States national, may be elected to the office of Representative or Senator if that person is a national of any country other than the United States.
